race.comment: PYROLYSIS (3) finished 3.5 lengths from the winner in sixth over 1000m at Gold Coast last start, a less impressive effort than her fifth at Doomben the run before. Finds a nice race this time and can feature in the finish. The well-related RACKETEER (4) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed Media World) was an impressive maiden winner last time out, scoring by 1.3 lengths over 1100m at Ipswich. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Jumps from a nice gate and he is certainly worth including. WHISPERING ROGUE (2) is resuming from a lay-off. Placed in a recent trial at Doomben. Opened last campaign with a seventh at Eagle Farm over 1200m. Goes well first-up. include. KILONOVA (7) was only beaten 2 lengths last start when fourth over 1000m at this track. In the mix.
